expected_output.summary: The monthly expense report shows $45,230.50 in total spending across 156 transactions, averaging $290.07 per transaction. Operations leads spending at $24,100.00 (53%), followed by Marketing at $13,500.50 (30%).
highlights: Operations accounts for over half of total spending
IT has the lowest transaction count but significant per-transaction average

expected_output.summary: Weekly sales reached $128,750.00 across 342 transactions. The North region leads with $52,000.00 in sales from 120 transactions, while the West region shows the lowest volume at $17,000.00.
highlights: North region drives 40% of total sales
South region shows strong performance relative to transaction count

expected_output.summary: Quarterly inventory shows $8,920.00 in movement across 45 items. Electronics dominates at $4,500.00 (50% of total), while Supplies has the highest item count at 18 but lowest total value.
highlights: Electronics has highest value per item at $300 average
Supplies volume is high but value per item is low ($90)
Total inventory movement is moderate at 45 items

expected_output.summary: 89 support tickets were processed today across three categories. Bug Reports lead at 34 tickets (38%), closely followed by Feature Requests at 28 and General Inquiries at 27.
highlights: Bug reports are the most common ticket type
No monetary values associated with tickets

input.data_description: Annual revenue breakdown by product line

expected_output.summary: Annual revenue totals $2,450,000.00 from 1,200 transactions. SaaS is the dominant revenue driver at $1,800,000.00 (73%), with Consulting contributing $450,000.00 despite fewer transactions.
highlights: SaaS accounts for nearly three-quarters of revenue
Consulting has highest per-transaction value at $3,000
Training volume is high but revenue contribution is modest

expected_output.summary: Monthly procurement totaled $67,500.00 across 78 orders. Raw Materials is the largest category at $35,000.00 (52%), followed by Services at $20,000.00.
highlights: Raw Materials drives over half of procurement spend
Equipment orders are smallest by both count and total value
